title: Love, Honor and Goodbye
writer: Art Arthur, Albert S. Rogell, Arthur Phillips
actors: Virginia Bruce, Edward Ashley, Victor McLaglen
plot: Attorney William Baxter and his secretary, Mary Riley, visit Bill's actress-wife Roberta on the set of her play. Her co-star, Tony Linnard, convinces Roberta to keep practicing, despite Bill's protests that he has not seen her alo...
